Welcome to
Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering

Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering

Skip Navigation Links
  • Programmes
  • Faculty

Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering

Overview

The Department of Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering (EIE) has been in existence since July 2009. Presently the branch is functioning under Electrical Engineering since 2021-22 academic session. The multifaceted undergraduate course provides a dynamic foundation to the students in EIE to be an industry ready. The Department aims to create competent Electronic and Instrumentation Engineers to serve the needs of evolving technology and the nation as a whole. The department is furnished by various well-equipped and unparalleled laboratories that an Industry demands to excel the knowledge in the undergraduate courses and the research purpose for the PhD students. The department offers a wide range of courses which address almost the entire arena covering Advanced Control System, Nano-electronics, Photonics, Industry 4.0 Instrumentation, Sensor and Transducer, Signal Processing, IoT, AI and Machine Learning to mention a few. The curriculum is updated regularly in tune with advancement in technology and its applications.

The Department has eight (8) highly qualified faculty members and five (5) experienced staff members to nurture highly competing young engineers, scientist and management professionals of International standard. Best endeavor is always being put forward for the recruitment of qualified and competent faculty members from all over the country to achieve all round growth at par with any other famous Institute. Placement record and its higher percentage of the department demand special mention and students have been placed in various reputed R&D organizations and eminent companies in India and abroad since inception.

The Department also offers PhD courses in interdisciplinary domain of Optics and photonics, Sensor devices, Signal and Image Processing, Industrial Instrumentation, Embedded system, Robotics to name a few. The infrastructure and lab facilities are excellent and provide adequate opportunities for students and researchers to learn and innovate.

 Academic Programmes:

The department currently offers the following programs:

1.      Under Graduate Program (B.Tech) in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering for 4 Years,

2.      Ph.D. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering.

Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering

Latest News

  • 5. Faculty member from the department has been selected in the top 2% scientist list published by Stanford University for the last three years.

  • 4. One SERB sponsored project worth INR 31 lakhs is still in progress.

  • 3. Two sponsored projects worth INR 36 lakhs were finished in the last three years.

  • 2. PSU companies are one of the major recruiters of EIE. For example, 9 students (14%) are placed in PSUs from Batch 2024.

  • 1. Placement percentage of EIE has been phenomenal since its inception. For Batch 2024, 93.85 % students are placed in several companies out of 76 students which is the highest among the different departments.. Among the total placed students more than 50% are placed in core sector.
